Contact

Have a question, suggestion, or just want to chat about AI tools? I'd love to hear from you.

What I Can Help With

  • Tool review requests and suggestions
  • Corrections or updates to existing articles
  • General questions about AI tools
  • Collaboration opportunities

What I Probably Can't Help With

  • Personal AI implementation advice (I don't have capacity for consulting)
  • Guest posting requests (my content stays authentic)
  • Spam

How to Reach Me

Send me an email at: hello@genaipick.com

I try to respond to all legitimate messages, but I get a lot of emails. Give me a few days, and I'll get back to you.

Thanks for reaching out!
